title: Stonecutter Tweaks
description: Lets you convert polished andesite, granite, diorite, and tuff to their unpolished variants. Also allows conversion of stone and deepslate to their cobbled variants
body:
Allows you to convert polished andesite, granite, diorite, and tuff into their unpolished variants using the stonecutter. This change helps make getting most of these stones easier; you can trade with mason villagers for the polished blocks then convert them to their unpolished variants.

Also allows you to convert stone and deepslate into their cobbled variants so you can use your silk touch pickaxe everytime you mine.
